title: Clever LMS Connect - Gradebook Sync Beginner's Guide
heading: Teacher
parentHeadings: Clever LMS Connect - Gradebook Sync Beginner's Guide
content:
#### Teacher

You can confirm the creation of your assignment by logging in to Google Classroom as a demo teacher. Please reach out to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#acc5c2d8c9cbdecdd8c5c3c2dfeccfc0c9dac9de82cfc3c1) to request end-user credentials for testing.

![Description of the image](https://files.readme.io/43997e902f3daac0577e61b284a922840a5eca7ff86f55511c6f4e9061467bba-image.png)  
_Creating the assignment from the teacher view_

![Description of the image](https://files.readme.io/fbf35f5a53bb24932239a97271b1ae1451af1f5d5f87f4fd92c380623faf19a3-image.png)  
_After updating the assignment from the teacher view_
